scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.ci: npm run verify:auth --prefix backend && npm run verify:notify --prefix backend && npm run migrate --prefix backend && node scripts/ci-smoke.js && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run mcp:verify
scripts.db:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres
scripts.setup: cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true && npm run db:up && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
